scripts.build: rm -f package-lock.json && npm --prefix prime-cloud install && npm --prefix prime-cloud run build && npm --prefix prime-cloud/deploy install --production && rm -rf prime-cloud/deploy/public/pos/* && cp -r prime-cloud/apps/pos/dist/* prime-cloud/deploy/public/pos/ && rm -rf prime-cloud/deploy/api/* && cp -r prime-cloud/apps/api/dist/* prime-cloud/deploy/api/ && rm -rf prime-cloud/deploy/public/dashboard && cp -r prime-cloud/apps/dashboard/out prime-cloud/deploy/public/dashboard
